issues.detail: The skill lacks error handling for API calls and does not cover edge cases such as rate limiting or network failures.
The skill is implemented only in Python and assumes specific libraries, limiting compatibility with other AI agents or environments.

scenarios.name: blog-post-with-affiliate-publish
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with a generate_blog_post call, placeholder replacement, REST API publish, meta description, and URL return, whereas Response A lacks these key elements.

scenarios.name: newsletter-send-via-resend
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items, while Response A lacks key requirements such as calling generate_newsletter and returning the email ID.
